name: /doctor token-cost reports a daily auto-refresh cost line item for the pr-corpus auto-refresh activity
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"date":"2026-05-13","tokens_consumed":3800}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/auto-refresh-cost.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --report token-cost --include daily-auto-refresh 2>out.txt && grep -q 'auto_refresh=pr-corpus date=2026-05-13 tokens=3800' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
